title: On Living Too Long
content:
Is it not better at an early hour
In its calm cell to rest the weary head,
While birds are singing and while blooms the bower,
Than sit the fire out and go starv�d to bed?
meaning: About: Walter Savage Landor (January 30, 1775 � September 17, 1864) was an English writer and poet, eldest son of Walter Landor and his wife Elizabeth Savage.
